boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; enrollment authority pending
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-ZEN-080 consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect in consent authority blocks closure
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-ZEN-080 shows consent C11 pending before 2026-06-28 activation

final_answer: The action boundary remains open because AUTH-ZEN-080 explicitly states that C11 enrollment authority is pending, despite other matching criteria. STD-ZEN-080-P mandates that all elements must be closed before enrollment can proceed. Therefore, an ESCALATE verdict is necessary to address this narrow defect in consent authority before any activation.
open_blockers: STD-ZEN-080-P requires all elements closed before enrollment
